name: rockstarr-content
description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources are cited inline and listed in References, never paraphrased as the client's voice. Researched-blog lane (v0.4) runs an external WebSearch research phase at outline time, requires an FAQ section in the body, enforces inline [Source: URL] citations and a 13-item SEO/GEO quality checklist as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Thought-leadership lane (v0.3) runs the canonical TL rubric as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Monthly planning pass (ideate → pick → calendar → approve) then per-piece drafting on the calendar's schedule. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.8.2+ for the shared blog-seo-geo reference; v0.8.1+ for the TL rubric; v0.4+ for the rest.
